title: tium obscurum
intro: Tium obscurum, also known as obscure or obscure thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tium obscurum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and providing antimicrobial protection against infections. Herbal preparations of Tium obscurum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
